member.name: T:EasyFramework.ELogStyleType
member.summary:
The style type of log.
日志样式类型

member.name: F:EasyFramework.ELogStyleType.Homochromy
member.summary: 单一色彩

member.name: F:EasyFramework.ELogStyleType.Multicolour
member.summary: 多色彩，日志类型与内容前后分离

member.name: T:EasyFramework.EFLogType
member.summary:
The log type (supports bit flags for caching filters).
记录类型（支持位掩码，用于缓存过滤）

member.name: F:EasyFramework.EFLogType.None
member.summary: 无类型（内部用）

member.name: F:EasyFramework.EFLogType.Log
member.summary:
Regular log
常规记录

member.name: F:EasyFramework.EFLogType.Emp
member.summary:
Emphasize log
突出记录

member.name: F:EasyFramework.EFLogType.War
member.summary:
Warning log
警告记录

member.name: F:EasyFramework.EFLogType.Err
member.summary:
Error log
错误记录

member.name: F:EasyFramework.EFLogType.Exc
member.summary:
Exceptions or Fatal log
异常或崩溃记录

member.name: F:EasyFramework.EFLogType.All
member.summary:
All types
全部类型

member.name: T:EasyFramework.D
member.summary:
Custom logger.
自定义日志

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.Init(System.Boolean,EasyFramework.ELogStyleType,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Initialize the debug system.
初始化记录系统
member.param:
Whether to enable logging.
是否打开记录

the color with log.
普通颜色

the color with warning log.
警告颜色

the color with error log.
错误颜色

the color with emphasize log.
突出标记颜色

the color with error log.
异常或崩溃颜色

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.Clear
member.summary:
Clear all cached logs.
清空全部日志

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.GetAllLogs(EasyFramework.EFLogType)
member.summary:
Obtain all logs by type.
按类型获取全部日志

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.Log(System.Object)
member.summary: 打印记录

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.Emphasize(System.Object)
member.summary: 打印突出提示的记录

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.Warning(System.Object)
member.summary: 打印警告记录

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.Error(System.Object)
member.summary: 打印错误记录

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.Exception(System.Object)
member.summary: 打印异常记录

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.SetMaxCachedEntries(System.Int32)
member.summary: 设置最大缓存条目数，需 Init 之后调用，会清空已有缓存

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.SetThrowOnException(System.Boolean)
member.summary:
设置是否在 Exception 方法中抛出异常 (默认 false，推荐 false)
Set whether exceptions are thrown within the Exception method (default: false, recommended: false)

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.SetCachedLogTypes(EasyFramework.EFLogType)
member.summary:
设置需要缓存的日志类型（位掩码组合），只对后续日志生效，已缓存的不受影响。
Specify the types of logs that need to be cached (bit mask combination), which will only take effect for subsequent logs. Cached logs will not be affected.

member.name: M:EasyFramework.D.IsColor(System.String)
member.summary:
Check the string is color
检查当前字符串是否为颜色值

member.name: T:EasyFramework.TStatic
member.summary: XH-Tools

member.name: M:EasyFramework.TStatic.IsInt(System.String)
member.summary: Check the string is int. 检查是否为整数

member.name: M:EasyFramework.TStatic.IsFloat(System.String)
member.summary: Check the string is float. 检查是否为单精度浮点数

member.name: M:EasyFramework.TStatic.IsColor(System.String)
member.summary: Check the string is color 检查当前字符串是否为颜色值

member.name: M:EasyFramework.TStatic.IsChinese(System.String)
member.summary: Check the string is in pure Chinese. 检查是否为纯中文

member.name: M:EasyFramework.TStatic.IsEnglish(System.String)
member.summary: Check the string is in pure English. 检查是否为纯英文

member.name: M:EasyFramework.TStatic.IsEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Check the string is a email. 检查是否为邮箱

member.name: M:EasyFramework.TStatic.IsDoubleBytes(System.String)
member.summary: Check the string is a double bytes. 检查是否为双字节

member.name: M:EasyFramework.TStatic.IsPhoneNumber(System.String)
member.summary: Check the string is a phone number. 检查是否为手机号

member.name: M:EasyFramework.TStatic.BytesToAudioClip(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Byte stream data to audio clip float array.字节流数据转音频单精度浮点型数组
